abilities.name: Waaagh!
abilities.description:
Once per battle, until your next Command phase:
  -> The unit gains the Advance & Charge ability.
  -> Add 1 to the unit's Strength characteristic (melee).
  -> Add 1 to the unit's Attacks characteristic (melee).
  -> The unit has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Fuel-mixa Grot
abilities.description: Until the end of the phase, add 6 to the unit's Move characteristic.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description: The unit gains the Leader ability.

abilities.description: During the Fight phase, after being attached to a unit, the unit gets +1 to Hit rolls.

abilities.name: Mekaniak
abilities.description:
Once per turn per model, at end of movement phase, in your turn, until your next Command phase:
  -> Select up to 1 friendly ORKS VEHICLE unit:
    -> The unit regains up to D3 lost wounds.
    -> The unit gets +1 to Hit rolls.

abilities.name: Deadly Demise 2D6
abilities.description:
Before this model is removed from play:
  -> Roll one D6: on a 6+, each enemy unit within 6" suffers 2D6 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Stompin' Forward
abilities.description: This model can move over terrain features as though they were not there.

abilities.name: Waaagh! Effigy (Aura)
abilities.description: If the unit has the ORKS keyword, for the rest of the battle, add 1 to the Leadership characteristic of friendly units within 12".

abilities.name: TRANSPORT
abilities.description: This model has a transport capacity of 22 ORKS INFANTRY models.
